title: Change only the worker timeout in an indentation-sensitive file
prompt:
In config.yaml change the WORKER timeout from 30 to 60. The api timeout stays 30; indentation is significant and must be preserved exactly. Current file:
service:
  api:
    timeout: 30
    retries: 2
  worker:
    timeout: 30
    retries: 2

seedFiles.config.yaml:
service:
  api:
    timeout: 30
    retries: 2
  worker:
    timeout: 30
    retries: 2

grade.value:
service:
  api:
    timeout: 30
    retries: 2
  worker:
    timeout: 60
    retries: 2
